title: Crispy Fresh Egyptian Pomegranate Salad
description: A light, vibrant salad that pairs crisp cucumber and sweet pomegranate seeds with a zesty lemonmint dressing, enhanced by a touch of cream of tartar for extra crunch.
instructions: Prepare all ingredients and set aside.
Heat olive oil in a non‑stick skillet over medium heat until shimmering but not smoking.
Add the cream of tartar to the oil and stir for 10 seconds to dissolve.
Add diced cucumber to the skillet, sauté for 2 minutes, stirring frequently, until just tender but still crisp.
Transfer the cucumber to a large bowl and immediately add sliced red onion, pomegranate seeds, and chopped mint.
Whisk together lemon juice, salt, pepper, and honey in a small cup until smooth.
Pour the dressing over the vegetables and gently fold to combine, ensuring even coverage.
Cover the bowl, refrigerate 5 minutes to allow flavors to meld, then serve chilled or at room temperature.
